response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack development with experience in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and other relevant technologies. They have demonstrated their ability to work on complex projects and contribute to various aspects of software development.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages and technologies
Experience with full-stack development and various tech stacks
Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail
concerns: Some experience is not directly aligned with the primary stack
No direct mention of experience with Nest.js or Vitest
Some projects and roles are not directly related to the job description
